urban_lines.title: Urban Lines Map
urban_lines.map_note: Use the mouse scroll wheel to zoom in and out, and drag the map to move around. You can also use the +, - buttons and the Home button to reset the view. On touch devices, zoom using pinch gestures, and move around by dragging with your finger.

note.title: About the interactive map
note.description: Markers on the map show key public transport points and other important locations across the city, including bus stops, the main bus station, railway stations, Nextbike stations, and the airport shuttle. Additional locations and features will be added over time.

tips.marker: Click on a marker to see the approximate walking time (radius ~5 min).
tips.layers: Use the layer controls to show or hide different types of locations on the map.

lines.title: Lines
lines.mapNote: Use the mouse scroll wheel to zoom in and out, and drag the map to move around. You can also use the +, - buttons and the Home button to reset the view. On touch devices, zoom using pinch gestures, and move around by dragging with your finger.
lines.infoText: Urban lines are organized into three groups, and each line card shows both its group and the operator responsible for that route.
lines.accordionText: Urban lines are organized into three groups, and each line card shows both its group and the operator responsible for that route.

timetable.title: Timetable
timetable.notFound: Timetable not found for the selected line.

notAvailable.title: Timetable Not Available
notAvailable.description: The timetable for this line is not available in our system yet. Please call the information line:
notAvailable.note: You can also check at bus stations or operator's sales points.

airport.title: Airport Transport
airport.descriptionTitle: Transfers to Banja Luka International Airport
airport.departureLocation: All departures are from the Old Bus Station (Vidovdanska street) and Main (New) Bus Station.
airport.moreInfo: For more information about departures, visit the operator's website.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about public transport in Banja Luka
faq.error: Sorry, we could not load the FAQ content at this time. Please try again later.

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Notices about transport changes, street closures, and timetable updates

hero.title: BL prevoz
hero.subtitle: Informacije za lakše kretanje gradom.
hero.description: Independent platform for routes, timetables, and public transport information.

ui.error: Error loading data. Please try again.

urban_lines.title: Mapa gradskih linija
urban_lines.map_note: Koristite točkić miša za zumiranje, a prevlačenjem miša pomjerajte mapu. Takođe, možete koristiti dugmad +, - za zumiranje i dugme "Home" za povratak na početni prikaz. Na pametnim uređajima, zumiranje vršite razdvajanjem ili približavanjem prstiju, a pomjeranje dodirom i prevlačenjem prsta po ekranu.

note.title: O interaktivnoj mapi
note.description: Markeri na mapi prikazuju ključne tačke javnog prevoza i druge važne lokacije u gradu, uključujući autobuska stajališta, glavnu autobusku stanicu, željezničke stanice, Nextbike stanice i aerodromski transfer. Novi sadržaji i lokacije biće postepeno dodavani.

tips.marker: Kliknite na marker da vidite približno vrijeme hodanja (radijus ~5 min).
tips.layers: Korištenjem kontrola za slojeve možete uključiti ili isključiti pojedine vrste lokacija na mapi.

lines.title: Linije
lines.mapNote: Koristite točkić miša za zumiranje, a prevlačenjem miša pomjerajte mapu. Takođe, možete koristiti dugmad +, - za zumiranje i dugme Home za povratak na početni prikaz. Na pametnim uređajima, zumiranje vršite razdvajanjem ili približavanjem prstiju, a pomjeranje dodirom i prevlačenjem prsta po ekranu.
lines.infoText: Gradske linije su organizovane u tri grupe, a svaka kartica linije prikazuje grupu i prevoznika koji održava tu liniju.
lines.accordionText: Gradske linije su organizovane u tri grupe, a svaka kartica linije prikazuje grupu i prevoznika koji održava tu liniju.

timetable.title: Red vožnje
timetable.notFound: Red vožnje nije pronađen za izabranu liniju.

notAvailable.title: Red vožnje nije dostupan
notAvailable.description: Red vožnje za ovu liniju još nije dostupan u našem sistemu. Molimo pozovite informativnu liniju:
notAvailable.note: Možete se informisati i na autobuskim stajalištima ili prodajnim mjestima prevoznika.

airport.title: Aerodromski prevoz
airport.descriptionTitle: Transferi do Međunarodnog aerodroma Banja Luka
airport.price: Cijena karte u jednom pravcu iznosi 10,00 KM
airport.departureLocation: Svi polasci su sa Stare autobuske stanice (Vidovdanska ulica) i Glavne (Nove) autobuske stanice.
airport.moreInfo: Za više informacija o polascima posjetite internet stranicu prevoznika.

faq.title: Često postavljana pitanja
faq.subtitle: Pronađite odgovore na najčešća pitanja o javnom prevozu u Banjoj Luci
faq.error: Izvinjavam se, nismo mogli učitati FAQ sadržaj u ovom trenutku. Molimo pokušajte kasnije.

updates.title: Obavještenja
updates.subtitle: Obavještenja o promjenama u prevozu, zatvaranjima ulica i izmjenama reda vožnje

hero.title: BL prevoz
hero.subtitle: Informacije za lakše kretanje gradom.
hero.description: Nezavisna platforma za pregled linija, redova vožnje i informacija o javnom prevozu.
